notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Tyler Soderstrom to 3rd. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Zack Gelof out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Tyler Soderstrom to 3rd. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Zack Gelof out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds into a double play, pitcher Fernando Cruz to catcher J.C. Escarra to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Henry Bolte out at home. Carlos Cortes out at 1st.
